common.resultInPastWarning: This will set the expiry to a past date. The seat will appear as expired.
common.totalCount: Total ({count, plural, one {# service} other {# services}})
common.dataRefresh: Data refreshes automatically every 60 seconds · Last fetched {time}
common.name: Name

landing.heroDescription: Automate your seat management, track profitability in real-time, and never miss a renewal with AI-powered reminders. Built for professionals.
landing.problemSubtitle: Managing multiple platforms and clients shouldn't feel like a full-time job.
landing.problemPoint1: Manual tracking in spreadsheets leads to missed renewals and lost revenue.
landing.problemPoint2: Calculating margins across different currencies is a headache.
landing.problemPoint3: Clients forgetting to pay on time disrupts your cash flow.
landing.solutionSubtitle: Pearfect centralizes everything, giving you total control over your shared subscription business.
landing.solutionPoint1Desc: Seats are assigned and tracked automatically. No more manual data entry errors.
landing.solutionPoint2Desc: See your net profit and margins updated as they happen. Stay in the green.
landing.solutionPoint3Desc: Enterprise-grade security for your credentials and client data. Peace of mind included.
landing.aboutDescription1: We started as a small group of friends trying to manage our shared family plans. We soon realized that thousands of businesses deal with the same complexity.
landing.aboutDescription2: Pearfect was born to simplify that journey, providing professional tools to anyone running a shared subscription model.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your growth. Scale as you go.
landing.faq1A: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption for all your credentials and client data. We never share your information with third parties.
landing.faq2Q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
landing.faq2A: Absolutely. You can downgrade or cancel your Pro plan at any time from your settings with one click.
landing.faq3Q: How do the WhatsApp reminders work?
landing.faq3A: Our system detects upcoming expirations and prepares a personalized message for you to send via WhatsApp Web or your phone in one click.
landing.finalCTASubtitle: Join thousands of users who have already perfected their subscription management.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Manage the services you are subscribed to.

plans.title: Plans
plans.description: Manage plan templates linked to your platforms.

subscriptions.autoRenewalDescription: Enable this if the service is charged automatically from your card or account.

clients.title: Clients
clients.description: Manage the people using your shared subscriptions.
clients.addDescription: Add a new client to your system.
clients.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. All personal data associated with this client will be permanently removed for GDPR compliance. Renewal history will be decoupled and preserved as anonymous financial data.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile information and account settings.

settings.securityDescription: Manage your password and account security.
settings.exportDescription: Download all your data as a JSON file.

settings.clearDataWarning: Delete all your business data while keeping your account and login.
settings.confirmClearData: Delete all data but keep account?
settings.clearDataDescription: This action cannot be undone. Platforms, plans, subscriptions, clients, renewals, history, and assistant data will be permanently deleted. Your account and login access will remain.
settings.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and all associated data.
settings.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete your account and remove all data from our servers.
settings.clearDataSuccess: Data deleted. Your account was kept.
settings.emailDescription: We can only contact verified emails.
settings.setupPasswordDescription: Set a password to log in without Google.
settings.setPasswordDescription: Set a password to log in using your email address instead of Google. Make sure it's at least 6 characters.
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
settings.passwordSetSuccess: Password set successfully! You can now log in with email and password.
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize how the application looks to you.
settings.currencyDescription: Choose the symbol used for prices (visual only).
